endpoints.name: search

queryParameters.name: query
queryParameters.docs: Search query - defaults to empty string when absent

queryParameters.name: limit
queryParameters.docs: Max results - defaults to 10 when absent

queryParameters.name: includeArchived
queryParameters.docs: Include archived items - defaults to false when absent

queryParameters.name: sortOrder
queryParameters.docs: Sort order - defaults to ASC when absent

queryParameters.name: optionalWithoutDefault
queryParameters.docs: Optional nullable without default - should check wasSpecified

queryParameters.name: regularOptional
queryParameters.docs: Another optional nullable with default for comparison

queryParameters.name: regularOptionalNoDefault
queryParameters.docs: Another optional nullable without default for comparison

endpoints.docs: Search endpoint with optional nullable query params with defaults
